title: F6: Line controller to host communication fault
summary: Fault code F6 indicates a communication failure between the line controller and the host unit.

structured_payload.applicable_models: MAC080D/DR, MAC100D/DR, MAC120D/DR, MAC150D/DR, MAC180D/DR, MAC210DM/DS, MAC230DM/DS, MAC210DRM/DRS, MAC230DRM/DRS

evidence_quote: 线控器显示            F6

title: XX: Slave unit communication fault (XX=00-15)
summary: Fault code XX (displayed as 00-15) indicates a communication fault with a specific slave unit.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            XX(XX为00-15)

title: EC78: Communication fault with all slave units
summary: Fault code EC78 indicates a communication failure with all slave units.
evidence_quote: 机组数码管显示        EC78

title: 16/ER16: Compressor overload (single system)
summary: Fault code 16 (line controller) or ER16 (host display) indicates a compressor overload for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 16
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        单系统显示： ER16

evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 16；双系统显示： 16（1#系统） 、 17（2#系统）

title: 17/ER17: Fan overload (single system)
summary: Fault code 17 (line controller) or ER17 (host display) indicates a fan overload for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 17
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        单系统显示： ER17

evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 17；双系统显示： 16（1#系统） 、 17（2#系统）

title: 33/ER33: High discharge temperature (dual system, system 1)
summary: Fault code 33 (line controller) or ER33 (host display) indicates high discharge temperature for system 1 in a dual system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 16；双系统显示： 33（1#系统） 、 35（2#系统）
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        单系统显示： ER16；双系统显示： ER33（1#系统） 、 ER35（2#系统）

evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 16；双系统显示： 33（1#系统） 、 35（2#系统）

title: 18/ER18: Water pump overload
summary: Fault code 18 (line controller) or ER18 (host display) indicates a water pump overload.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            18

title: 19/ER19: Water pressure differential switch alarm
summary: Fault code 19 (line controller) or ER19 (host display) indicates a water pressure differential switch alarm.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            19

summary: Fault code 20 (line controller) or ER20 (host display) indicates a high pressure fault for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 20；双系统显示： 20（1#系统） 、 24（2#系统）
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        单系统显示： ER20；双系统显示： ER20（1#系统） 、 ER24（2#系统）

summary: Fault code 21 (line controller) or ER21 (host display) indicates a low pressure fault for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 21；双系统显示： 21（1#系统） 、 36（2#系统）
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        单系统显示： ER21；双系统显示： ER21（1#系统） 、 ER36（2#系统）

title: 23/ER23: System fault (single system only)
summary: Fault code 23 (line controller) or ER23 (host display) indicates a system fault, applicable only to single systems.

structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示        ER23或ER23与ER16、ER23与ER17、ER23与ER20、ER23与ER21同时出现

evidence_quote: 线控器显示            23

title: 25/ER25: Low leaving water temperature
summary: Fault code 25 (line controller) or ER25 (host display) indicates low leaving water temperature.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            25

title: 26/ER26: Water system electric heater overload
summary: Fault code 26 (line controller) or ER26 (host display) indicates a water system electric heater overload.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            26

title: 27/ER27: Ambient temperature too high or too low
summary: Fault code 27 (line controller) or ER27 (host display) indicates ambient temperature is too high or too low.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            27

summary: Fault code 28 (line controller) or ER28 (host display) indicates the emergency operation function has been activated, applicable only to single systems.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            28

summary: Fault code 31 (line controller) or ER31 (host display) indicates a master-slave communication fault.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            31

summary: Fault code 32 (line controller) or ER32 (host display) indicates high return gas temperature for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示          单系统显示： 32；双系统显示： 32（1#系统） 、 34（2#系统）
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示      单系统显示： ER32；双系统显示： ER32（1#系统） 、 ER34（2#系统）

summary: Fault code 38 (line controller) or ER38 (host display) indicates a refrigerant leak for system 1 in a dual system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            38、39

title: 53/ER53: Low pressure sensor fault (single system)
summary: Fault code 53 (line controller) or ER53 (host display) indicates a low pressure sensor fault for a single system.

structured_payload.display: 线控器显示          单系统显示： 53；双系统显示： 53（1#系统） 、 52（2#系统）
structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示      单系统显示： ER53；双系统显示： ER53（1#系统） 、 ER52（2#系统）

title: ER41-ER51: Temperature sensor fault
summary: Fault codes ER41, ER42, ER43, ER45, ER46, ER47, ER48, ER49, ER51 (single system) and additional codes for dual systems indicate temperature sensor faults.

structured_payload.host_display: 主机数码管显示       单系统显示： ER41、ER42、ER43、ER45、ER46、ER47、ER48、ER49、ER51

evidence_quote: 主机数码管显示       单系统显示： ER41、ER42、ER43、ER45、ER46、ER47、ER48、ER49、ER51

title: Discharge temperature high limit (single system)
summary: The discharge temperature high limit for a single system is 125°C.
evidence_quote: 压缩机的排气温度超过 125℃（单系统）

title: Discharge temperature high limit (dual system)
summary: The discharge temperature high limit for a dual system is 130°C.
evidence_quote: 压缩机的排气温度超过 125℃（单系统） 、 130℃（双系统）

title: Emergency operation low pressure threshold
summary: The emergency operation function activates when low pressure is below 3.3 bar for 60 seconds after compressor has run for two minutes.
evidence_quote: 压缩机运行两分钟后，低压 低于3.3 bar持续60s

title: Low system superheat threshold (single system)
summary: Low system superheat fault is triggered when superheat is below 2°C for 5 minutes in a single system.
evidence_quote: 单系统： 过热度低于 2℃持续5分钟

title: Low system superheat threshold (dual system)
summary: Low system superheat fault is triggered when superheat is below 1°C for 5 minutes in a dual system.
evidence_quote: 双系统：过热 度低于1℃持续5分钟

title: High return gas temperature threshold
summary: High return gas temperature fault is triggered when return gas temperature is greater than 40°C for 10 seconds.
evidence_quote: 回气温度大于 40℃持续 10S

title: Refrigerant leak low pressure threshold (R410A)
summary: Refrigerant leak fault is triggered when low pressure is below 3.6 bar for R410A refrigerant.
evidence_quote: 制冷/制热开机时，当低压低于 1.8(R410A 为3.6bar)bar

title: System fault (ER23) trigger conditions
summary: System fault ER23 is triggered by three occurrences of low pressure alarm, high pressure alarm, high discharge temperature, or fan overload.
evidence_quote: 机组出现 3次低压报警

title: Low leaving water temperature trigger condition
summary: Low leaving water temperature fault is triggered when leaving water temperature is below the set cooling anti-freeze temperature for 3 seconds (5 seconds for dual system).

structured_payload.trigger_condition: 出水温度连续 3s（双系统 5秒）低于设置制冷防冻温度

evidence_quote: 出水温度连续 3s（双系统 5秒）低于设置制冷防冻温度

title: Check communication wiring for F6 fault
summary: For F6 fault, check if the communication line A/B is reversed or disconnected between the line controller and host.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 检查通讯接线并予以解决

evidence_quote: 检查通讯接线并予以解决

title: Check slave unit address settings for XX fault
summary: For XX slave communication fault, check if the slave unit address dip switch settings are incorrect or duplicated.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 将所有的从机地址按照规格书重新设置，看是否设有重复地址

evidence_quote: 将所有的从机地址按照规格书重新设置，看是否设有重复地址

title: Check compressor for defects on overload fault
summary: For compressor overload fault, check if the compressor has defects such as winding short circuit, open circuit, shaft seizure, or ground fault.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 电机绕阻有短路或断路 电机轴抱死 电机绕阻接地

evidence_quote: 电机绕阻有短路或断路

title: Check fan motor for defects on fan overload fault
summary: For fan overload fault, check if the fan motor has winding short circuit, open circuit, or ground fault.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 电机绕阻有短路、断路或接地

evidence_quote: 电机绕阻有短路、断路或接地

title: Check water system for low leaving water temperature fault
summary: For low leaving water temperature fault, check the water system, referencing the water pressure differential switch alarm section.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 检查水系统，参考第 8节水压差开关报警

evidence_quote: 检查水系统，参考第 8节水压差开关报警

title: Check four-way valve for high return gas temperature fault
summary: For high return gas temperature fault, check if the four-way valve spool is stuck in the middle or if the coil is malfunctioning.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 重新开机并轻敲四通阀两侧，若无效果则更换

evidence_quote: 重新开机并轻敲四通阀两侧，若无效果则更换

title: Check low pressure sensor wiring for sensor fault
summary: For low pressure sensor fault, check if the three wires of the low pressure sensor are reversed.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 低压传感器的三条线是否 接反

evidence_quote: 低压传感器的三条线是否 接反

title: Check temperature sensor connection for sensor fault
summary: For temperature sensor fault, check if the temperature sensor is disconnected or not properly plugged in.

structured_payload.diagnostic_step: 检查控制模块，插好温度传感器

evidence_quote: 检查控制模块，插好温度传感器

title: Clean heat exchanger for high discharge temperature fault
summary: For high discharge temperature fault, clean the heat exchanger if it is dirty.
evidence_quote: 清洗热交换器

title: Clean water filter for water pressure differential switch alarm
summary: For water pressure differential switch alarm, clean the water filter if it is clogged.
evidence_quote: 清洗水过滤器

title: Release refrigerant for high pressure fault
summary: For high pressure fault due to refrigerant overcharge, release an appropriate amount of refrigerant.
evidence_quote: 适当释放部分制冷剂

title: Add refrigerant for refrigerant leak fault
summary: For refrigerant leak fault, charge an appropriate amount of refrigerant.
evidence_quote: 充注适量制冷剂

title: Communication line routing for F6 fault prevention
summary: To prevent F6 communication fault, route communication lines to avoid running parallel with high voltage lines or use shielded cables.

structured_payload.guidance: 重新走线，通讯线尽量避免与强电同时走线或使用屏蔽线

evidence_quote: 重新走线，通讯线尽量避免与强电同时走线或使用屏蔽线

title: Water system optimization for water pressure differential switch alarm
summary: For water pressure differential switch alarm due to excessive pressure drop, optimize the water system.
evidence_quote: 优化水系统
